__fixture__.name: watcher_fallback_polling
__fixture__.scenario: The OS-native watcher on a large local root reported a buffer-overflow event. The VFS transitions watcher_health from healthy to degraded, then to fallback_polling after repeated overflows. Downstream subscriptions emit freshness downgrades (ADR 0005 subscription_freshness_downgrade with stale_reason = watcher_dropped). Save pipeline correctness is unchanged because compare_before_write still runs at save time; only event latency degrades.
